Please implement a fully integrated system connecting **Purchases, Inventory, and P&L (Cost of Sales)** with automated calculations and real-time updates.

---

### 1. DATA STRUCTURE

Create unified product master data:

* Item ID (auto-generated)
* Item Name
* Category
* Unit of Measure (kg, pcs, etc.)

---

### 2. PURCHASES MODULE (SOURCE OF TRUTH)

* All items must be created/added ONLY through Purchases
* Each purchase entry includes:

  * Item ID / Name
  * Quantity purchased
  * Total cost
  * Unit cost (auto-calculated = Total ÷ Quantity)
* If the same item is purchased multiple times:

  * Apply **Weighted Average Cost (WAC)**:

    New Avg Cost = (Old Qty × Old Cost + New Qty × New Cost) ÷ Total Qty

---

### 3. INVENTORY MODULE (AUTO-SYNC)

* Inventory should automatically:

  * Pull item names from Purchases
  * Pull latest calculated **average unit cost**
* User ONLY inputs:

  * Opening stock (first time only)
  * Adjustments (if needed)
* System auto-calculates:

  * Current stock quantity
  * Inventory value = Quantity × Avg Cost

---

### 4. STOCK MOVEMENT LOGIC

Track all movements:

* Purchases → Increase stock
* Sales / Consumption → Decrease stock
* Adjustments → Manual correction (with reason log)

---

### 5. COST OF SALES (COGS) – AUTO CALCULATION

Implement real-time COGS calculation:

COGS = Opening Inventory + Purchases - Closing Inventory

OR (preferred for accuracy):

COGS = Sum of (Consumed Quantity × Avg Cost)

* Every sale or recipe consumption should deduct from inventory
* Automatically calculate cost per transaction

---

### 6. P&L INTEGRATION

* Link COGS directly to P&L under:
  → Cost of Goods Sold
* Revenue comes from sales module
* System calculates:
  → Gross Profit = Revenue - COGS

---

### 7. REAL-TIME SYNC RULES

* Any update in Purchases must instantly reflect in:

  * Inventory valuation
  * Average cost
* Any stock change updates:

  * Inventory balance
  * COGS
  * P&L

---

### 8. REPORTS REQUIRED

* Inventory Report:

  * Item / Qty / Avg Cost / Total Value
* Stock Movement Report (audit log)
* COGS Report (daily, weekly, monthly)
* P&L Report (auto-updated)

---

### 9. VALIDATION RULES

* No negative stock allowed
* No manual price entry in Inventory
* All pricing must come from Purchases only

---

### 10. OPTIONAL (ADVANCED – IF POSSIBLE)

* Recipe / BOM system:

  * Each menu item deducts ingredients automatically
* Alerts:

  * Low stock notification
* Multi-location support (future-ready)

---

Goal: Fully automated system with zero manual duplication, accurate costing, and real-time financial reporting.
